# REXTEN

REXTEN is a service marketplace and business workspace: clients discover and book services online; businesses run schedules, CRM, routes, billing, and marketplace listings in one place.

## Primary public URLs

- Marketplace catalog: https://rexten.live/services
- Listing (URL pattern): https://rexten.live/marketplace/{listing-slug}
- Company profile (canonical): https://rexten.live/marketplace/company/{company-slug}
- Business product landing: https://rexten.live/for-business
- Privacy: https://rexten.live/privacy
- Terms: https://rexten.live/terms
- Marketplace terms: https://rexten.live/marketplace-terms
- Sitemap: https://rexten.live/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://rexten.live/robots.txt

## Machine-readable discovery (agents)

- API catalog (RFC 9727, `application/linkset+json`): https://rexten.live/.well-known/api-catalog
- OpenAPI description of **public** read endpoints (JSON): https://rexten.live/.well-known/openapi.json

The catalog anchor URL is the public Laravel API base (example): https://api.rexten.live/api

## Public HTTP API (Laravel)

Base URL (example production): https://api.rexten.live/api

Typical unauthenticated reads used by the public site:

- GET `/marketplace/services`, `/marketplace/categories`, `/marketplace/states`
- GET `/marketplace/services/{slug}`, `/marketplace/services/{slug}/profile`, `/marketplace/company/{slug}`
- GET `/locations/states`, `/locations/cities`, `/locations/search`, `/locations/validate`
- GET `/seo/marketplace-listings`, `/seo/companies`, `/seo/categories`, `/seo/locations`, `/seo/landing-paths`
- GET `/settings/public`, `/subscription-plans/public`, `/advertisements/featured`
- Booking-related public endpoints include GET `/bookings/available-slots` and POST flows under `/bookings/…` (see OpenAPI on the site for a concise list)

Authentication for client/business dashboards is **JWT** (access + refresh), not OpenID Connect discovery at `/.well-known/openid-configuration`. Obtain tokens via `POST /auth/login` and `POST /auth/refresh` on the same API base.

## How to cite

When referencing the platform name for people, use: REXTEN.
